paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports an experimental method using cross-sectional scanning thermal microscopy to measure anisotropic in-plane and cross-plane thermal conductivity in a 2D perovskite (PEA2PbI4) nanolayer.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to be an experimental condensed matter/materials study on anisotropic thermal transport in 2D perovskite (PEA2PbI4), but based on the available information there is no confirmed accessible dataset, source data, or supplementary data file.
